stemHtml:
Refer to figure Tromso chart 11-2 from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
During the missed approach for Tromso, Norway (ENTC) ILS Rwy 19, the initial turn for an approach category C aeroplane must be performed at a speed not exceeding 160 kt, as otherwise you might...

options.a: exceed the maximum speed for the final missed approach segment for the aircraft approach category.
options.b: NOT be able to complete the missed approach turn within 7.7 DME TR in tailwind conditions and thus fly close to terrain.
options.c: exceed the calculated radius of turn and thus fly outside the protected area of the procedure.
options.d: NOT be able to comply with the missed approach minimum climb gradient requirements.
